content: Active Agentic Retrieval search agents can be reimagined as modern, dynamic neural Turing machines adapted for open-domain knowledge access, where the external knowledge base acts as the NTM’s external memory bank, and the agent’s dynamic query decomposition acts as the NTM’s learned read-write head operations. This hybrid design would let agents learn to algorithmically retrieve and compose information to answer complex queries through end-to-end reinforcement, just as original NTMs learned to sort or copy sequences from examples.
source_topics: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
trigger_topic: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
